messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: human
messages.text:
On that, can we have the BL icons have a visual clue as to how far through the swarm they are?
Is it possible to repaint their icon going from 100% grayed out to 100% coulorfull, or somethin like this?

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Remap feature-in-flight topic icon from bulb to musical note (orchestra icons)
What it solves: WHAT: within Telegram's free getForumTopicIconStickers set (live-checked
2026-07-15: 112 stickers, performance emoji but NO instruments/notation),
remap the ONE ticket-level state that has a musical stand-in:
  - feature-in-flight: 💡 -> 🎵 ("a passage being played")
UNCHANGED (no musical stand-in …
How it works: An active non-bug (feature) ticket resolves to the 🎵 musical-note icon

messages.author: human
messages.text: Also: visual cue on the BL icons that need approval.
